content_markdown:
# Cosmic Citizenship
## Scripture
"But our citizenship is in heaven. And we eagerly await a Savior from there, the Lord Jesus Christ, who, by the power that enables him to bring everything under his control, will transform our lowly bodies so that they will be like his glorious body." - Philippians 3:20-21
## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of our place in the universe and our true citizenship. Just as the planets orbit around their stars, our lives orbit around God's eternal plan. The stars and galaxies serve as a reminder of God's power and control over all creation. As cosmic citizens, we're called to live with an eternal perspective, knowing that our true home is in heaven. Our bodies may be earthly, but our spirits are rooted in the heavenly realm.
## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, we're grateful for the reminder of our cosmic citizenship. Help us to live with an eternal perspective, keeping our eyes fixed on you and your glorious plan. As we navigate the challenges of life on earth, remind us that our true home is in heaven, and that you're transforming us to be like Jesus. Empower us to shine as lights in the darkness, reflecting your glory and love to a world in need. May our lives be a testament to your power and control over all creation.
